title: Separate semantAH demo stubs from production snapshot

execution.summary: Prevent the current stub tools from counting as production pipeline proof in WGX snapshot and related surfaces.

acceptance.assertion: build_index.py, build_graph.py, and update_related.py are demo-only or require an explicit demo flag.
WGX snapshot no longer treats dummy artifacts as proof of a real semantic pipeline.
A production ingest smoke either executes a real ingest path or fails with an explicit blocker.
